title: Tingly Fatty Filipino Fish Soup
description: A fluffy, energizing fish soup that blends the savory depth of red curry paste with a tangy tamarind base, reminiscent of sinigang.
instructions: Heat a pot over medium heat and sauté the onion, carrot and bell pepper until softened, about 4 minutes.
Stir in the red curry paste and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the fish stock, coconut milk and tamarind paste, bring to a gentle simmer.
Add the diced tomato and let the broth simmer for 5 minutes to meld flavors.
Stir in the fish sauce, sugar and a pinch of salt, adjusting seasoning as desired.
Gently fold in the tilapia pieces, ensuring they are not broken, and cook until opaque, about 6 minutes.
Add the fresh cilantro and simmer for an additional minute to warm the herbs.
Taste the soup; if more acidity is desired, squeeze in a teaspoon of fresh lime juice.
Remove from heat and let the soup rest for 2 minutes before serving.
Ladle into bowls, garnish with extra cilantro if desired, and serve hot.
